raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tapehz ka tee jums ne
mahza darriht pehz wiffahin win-
xu Negantibahm/ ko tee faweemi
Deeweem irr darrijschi / ka juhs
prett to KUNGU juhsu Deewu
grehkotat.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rad tu kahdu Pilsfahrtu
ilgu Laiku apstahfi / prett winnu
farrodams / winnu uswarreht/
tad tew ne buhs winna augligus
Kohkus maitaht / tohs nozirs-
dams/ jo af Zilweks ! gan irr Me-
scha-Kohku / no ka Bulwerkus
taihiht warr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tohs Kohkus/ ko juhs
pasihfeet/ ka tee ehdama Kohki ne
irr/ tohs warri tu maitaht/ un ts-
zirst / un tew buhs weenu Bul-
werki uszelt prett to Pilsfahrtu/
kas ar tewun karro/kamehr tu to
uswarri.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta XXI. Nodalla.
Rahda Teesa jaturr / kad kahds nokauts Laukâ
tohp atrasts/ un ne finnamâ/ kas to darrijs:
1. Ka buhs to nenoseedsigu Affini falihdsinaht:
5. Ka weena sagubstitu Seewu / kas Karrâ
remta/ warr par laulatu Draugu xeint: 10/
11. Ta pirmdsimmuscha Dehla Teesas:
15. Ka buhs weenu neklausigu Dehlu no-
faut : 18. Weens Pakahrts irr nolah-
dehts: 22.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ad weens nokauts tohp
Atrasts tai Senunê / ko
tas KUNGS taws
Deews tew dohs eeniantoht / un
gull us Lauku/ un ne weens warr
finnaht/ kas to nokawis irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad buhs tarveem Wezza-
jeem/ un tarveem Sohgeemahra
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "eet/ un mehrocht pehz teem Pills
fahteem/ kas apkahrt to Nokau-
tu irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kursch Pillsfahts nu tam
Nokautam jo tuwu irr / ta pa-
scha Pillsfahta Wezzajee laid xen-
weenu Gohtinu no leeleeni Loh-
peein/ar ko wehl ne irr strahdahts
kas ne kahdu Juhgu wehl ne ir-
wilkufi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un ta Pillsfahta Wezzajeen
buhs to Gohtinu eeksch weenu ak-
minatnu Eeleju nowest / kas n-
tohp apstrahdata nedg apfehta-
un teem buhs tur tai Gohtina
to Kaklu nozirst.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad buhs teem Preesterkeen
teem Lewja Behrneem pee-eet/ j-
tas KUNGS taws Deews ir-
tohs isredsejs winnam kalpoht
un eeksch winna Wahrdn five-
tiht/ un pehz winna Wahrdn la-
wiffa Kilda un wiffa Waina lit-
dsinata tohp.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad buhs ta Pillsfahrt
Wezzajeem/ kas tain Nokautan-
tuwaks irr/ fawas Rohkas pah-
to Gohtian masgaht / kam ta-
Kaklis Eelejâ nozirsts irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un teem buhs Leezibu doht-
n fazziht : Muhfas Rohkas n-
irr scho Affini islehjuschas / u-
muhfas Azzis ne irr to redsejschas
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Effi schehligs taweem J-
sraeka Laudim / ko tu KUNGS-
effi atpestijs / un ne peelahgahd-
nenoseedsigu Affini tawerm J-
sraeka Laudim/ tad tee taps pah-
scho Affini falihdsinati.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta buhs tew to nenoseeds
Ecc 2
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
